title: calamagrostis × acutiflora
intro: Calamagrostis × acutiflora, also known as feathertop grass, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is a perennial grass that is native to Europe and Asia, and is widely cultivated for its ornamental value. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of calamagrostis × acutiflora include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, and it can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for herbal use.
